assignments.name: Set_Lead_Id_From_Existing
assignments.label: Set Lead ID from Existing Lead

decisions.name: Account_Owner_Is_Rep
decisions.label: Account Owner Is Real Sales Rep?
decisions.defaultConnectorLabel: No — system/non-standard owner, stay on queue

decisions.name: Check_B2B_Account_Owner
decisions.label: B2B with Existing Account?
decisions.defaultConnectorLabel: No — B2C or no account match

decisions.name: Is_Support_Form
decisions.label: Is this a Support (Contact Us) Submission?

Flow.description: Becker RFI Lead Routing v20 — routing matrix baked into SF flow (no Node.js/RFI_Suggested_Queue__c needed). Drupal webform submits directly; flow computes queue from Organization_Type__c x Organization_Size__c.

formulas.name: varComputedQueue
formulas.expression: IF(TEXT({!$Record.Requesting_for__c}) != "My organization", "CS - Inside Sales", IF(TEXT({!$Record.Organization_Type__c}) = "Non-US Organization", "International", IF(OR(TEXT({!$Record.Organization_Type__c}) = "University", TEXT({!$Record.Organization_Type__c}) = "Society/Chapter"), "University", IF(OR(TEXT({!$Record.Organization_Type__c}) = "Consulting Firm", TEXT({!$Record.Organization_Type__c}) = "CPA Alliance"), "Global Firms", IF(TEXT({!$Record.Organization_Type__c}) = "Accounting Firm", IF(TEXT({!$Record.Organization_Size__c}) = "<25", "CS - Inside Sales", "Global Firms"), IF(TEXT({!$Record.Organization_Type__c}) = "Student", "CS - Inside Sales", IF(TEXT({!$Record.Organization_Size__c}) = "<25", "CS - Inside Sales", "New Client Acquisition")))))))

formulas.name: varCUFProductInterest
formulas.expression: IF( OR(TEXT({!$Record.Primary_Interest__c}) = "CIA_CHALLENGE", TEXT({!$Record.Primary_Interest__c}) = "CIA Challenge Exam"), "CIA", IF(TEXT({!$Record.Primary_Interest__c}) = "EA", "EA Exam Review", TEXT({!$Record.Primary_Interest__c}) ) )

formulas.name: varCUFCountryPart1
formulas.expression: CASE(TEXT({!$Record.Address__CountryCode__s}),"AF","Afghanistan","AX","Aland Islands","AL","Albania","DZ","Algeria","AS","American Samoa","AD","Andorra","AO","Angola","AI","Anguilla","AQ","Antarctica","AG","Antigua and Barbuda","AR","Argentina","AM","Armenia","AW","Aruba","AC","Ascension Island","AU","Australia","AT","Austria","AZ","Azerbaijan","BS","Bahamas","BH","Bahrain","BD","Bangladesh","BB","Barbados","BY","Belarus","BE","Belgium","BZ","Belize","BJ","Benin","BM","Bermuda","BT","Bhutan","BO","Bolivia","BQ","Bonaire, Sint Eustatius and Saba","BA","Bosnia and Herzegovina","BW","Botswana","BV","Bouvet Island","BR","Brazil","IO","British Indian Ocean Territory","VG","British Virgin Islands","BN","Brunei","BG","Bulgaria","BF","Burkina Faso","BI","Burundi","KH","Cambodia","CM","Cameroon","CA","Canada","CV","Cape Verde","KY","Cayman Islands","CF","Central African Republic","TD","Chad","CL","Chile","CN","China","CX","Christmas Island","CC","Cocos (Keeling) Islands","CO","Colombia","KM","Comoros","CG","Congo","CD","Congo, the Democratic Republic of the","CK","Cook Islands","CR","Costa Rica","CI","Cote D'Ivoire","HR","Croatia","CU","Cuba","CW","Curaçao","CY","Cyprus","CS","Czechoslovakia (former)","CZ","Czech Republic","DK","Denmark","DJ","Djibouti","DM","Dominica","DO","Dominican Republic","TL","East Timor","EC","Ecuador","EG","Egypt","SV","El Salvador","GQ","Equatorial Guinea","ER","Eritrea","EE","Estonia","ET","Ethiopia","EU","European Union","FK","Falkland Islands (Malvinas)","FO","Faroe Islands","FJ","Fiji","FI","Finland","FR","France","FX","France, Metropolitan","GF","French Guiana","PF","French Polynesia","TF","French Southern Territories","GA","Gabon","GM","Gambia","GE","Georgia","DE","Germany","GH","Ghana","GI","Gibraltar","GR","Greece","GL","Greenland","GD","Grenada","GP","Guadeloupe","GU","Guam","GT","Guatemala","GG","Guernsey","")

formulas.name: varCUFCountryPart2
formulas.expression: CASE(TEXT({!$Record.Address__CountryCode__s}),"GN","Guinea","GW","Guinea-Bissau","GY","Guyana","HT","Haiti","HM","Heard and Mcdonald Islands","VA","Holy See (Vatican City State)","HN","Honduras","HK","Hong Kong","HU","Hungary","IS","Iceland","IN","India","ID","Indonesia","IR","Iran","IQ","Iraq","IE","Ireland","IM","Isle of Man","IL","Israel","IT","Italy","JM","Jamaica","JP","Japan","JE","Jersey","JO","Jordan","KZ","Kazakhstan","KE","Kenya","KI","Kiribati","XK","Kosovo","KW","Kuwait","KG","Kyrgyzstan","LA","Laos","LV","Latvia","LB","Lebanon","LS","Lesotho","LR","Liberia","LY","Libya","LI","Liechtenstein","LT","Lithuania","LU","Luxembourg","MO","Macau","MK","Macedonia, the former Yugoslav Republic of","MG","Madagascar","MW","Malawi","MY","Malaysia","MV","Maldives","ML","Mali","MT","Malta","MI","Marshall Islands","MH","Marshall Islands","MQ","Martinique","MR","Mauritania","MU","Mauritius","YT","Mayotte","MX","Mexico","FM","Micronesia","MD","Moldova","MC","Monaco","MN","Mongolia","ME","Montenegro","MS","Montserrat","MA","Morocco","MZ","Mozambique","MM","Myanmar","NA","Namibia","NR","Nauru","NP","Nepal","NL","Netherlands","AN","Netherlands Antilles","NT","Neutral Zone","NC","New Caledonia","NZ","New Zealand","NI","Nicaragua","NE","Niger","NG","Nigeria","NU","Niue","NF","Norfolk Island","MP","Northern Mariana Islands","KP","North Korea","NO","Norway","OM","Oman","PK","Pakistan","PW","Palau","PS","Palestinian Territories","PA","Panama","PG","Papua New Guinea","PY","Paraguay","PE","Peru","PH","Philippines","PN","Pitcairn","PL","Poland","PT","Portugal","PR","Puerto Rico","QA","Qatar","RE","Reunion","RO","Romania","RU","Russian Federation","RW","Rwanda","BL","Saint Barthélemy","SH","Saint Helena","KN","Saint Kitts and Nevis","LC","Saint Lucia","MF","Saint Martin (French part)","")

formulas.name: varCUFCountryPart3
formulas.expression: CASE(TEXT({!$Record.Address__CountryCode__s}),"VC","Saint Vincent and the Grenadines","WS","Samoa","SM","San Marino","ST","Sao Tome and Principe","SA","Saudi Arabia","SN","Senegal","RS","Serbia","YU","Serbia and Montenegro (former Yugoslavia)","SC","Seychelles","SL","Sierra Leone","SG","Singapore","SX","Sint Maarten (Dutch part)","SK","Slovakia","SI","Slovenia","SB","Solomon Islands","SO","Somalia","ZA","South Africa","GS","South Georgia and the South Sandwich Islands","KR","South Korea","SS","South Sudan","ES","Spain","LK","Sri Lanka","PM","St. Pierre And Miquelon","SD","Sudan","SR","Suriname","SJ","Svalbard And Jan Mayen Islands","SZ","Swaziland","SE","Sweden","CH","Switzerland","SY","Syrian Arab Republic","TW","Taiwan","TJ","Tajikistan","TZ","Tanzania","TH","Thailand","TG","Togo","TK","Tokelau","TO","Tonga","TT","Trinidad and Tobago","TN","Tunisia","TR","Turkey","TM","Turkmenistan","TC","Turks and Caicos Islands","TV","Tuvalu","UG","Uganda","UA","Ukraine","AE","United Arab Emirates","GB","United Kingdom","UK","United Kingdom","US","United States","UY","Uruguay","UM","US Minor Outlying Islands","SU","USSR (former)","UZ","Uzbekistan","VU","Vanuatu","VE","Venezuela","VN","Viet Nam","VI","Virgin Islands (U.S.)","WF","Wallis and Futuna Islands","EH","Western Sahara","YE","Yemen","ZM","Zambia","ZW","Zimbabwe","")

formulas.name: varSubscriptionIds
formulas.expression: IF(TEXT({!$Record.Requesting_for__c}) = "My organization", "B2B - News and Events;B2B - Events;B2B - New Products", IF(TEXT({!$Record.Primary_Interest__c}) = "CPA", "CPA Content;CPA Promotions", IF(TEXT({!$Record.Primary_Interest__c}) = "CMA", "CMA Content;CMA Promotions", IF(TEXT({!$Record.Primary_Interest__c}) = "CPE", "CPE Content;CPE Promotions", IF(TEXT({!$Record.Primary_Interest__c}) = "CIA", "CIA Content;CIA Promotions", IF(TEXT({!$Record.Primary_Interest__c}) = "EA", "EA Content;EA Promotions", IF(TEXT({!$Record.Primary_Interest__c}) = "CFP", "CPA Content;CPA Promotions", "CPA Content;CPA Promotions")))))))

Flow.label: Becker RFI Lead Routing

recordLookups.name: Lookup_Account_Owner_User
recordLookups.label: Look Up Account Owner (Sales Rep — has Sales Channel set)

recordLookups.name: Lookup_Inside_Sales_Fallback
recordLookups.label: Fallback — Look Up CS - Inside Sales Queue

recordLookups.name: Lookup_Queue
recordLookups.label: Look Up Queue by Computed Matrix Queue Name
